rulings.Case Title: MICKEY Y WONG VS. DORIS WONG et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Expunge Lis Pendens Against 4430-4432 California St
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, October 29, 2013, line 2. (part 1 of 3) DEFENDANT DORIS WONG Notice Of Motion To Expunge Lis Pendens Against 4430-4432 California Street. GRANTED. Plaintiff failed to show by preponderance of evidence probability of prevailing on the merits on his real property claim. CCP 405.32. Sanctions granted in the amount of $4,185. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: STAPLETON, DAVID P., THE COURT-APPOINTED RECEIVER VS. 3066 MARKET STREET, LLC et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Plaintiff'S Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Response To Discovery And For Sanctions;Memorandum Of Points And Authorities
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, October 29, 2013, line 3. Plaintiff'S Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Response To Discovery And For Sanctions; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities. GRANTED, Defendant Damien Quinn shall serve responses to Form Interrogatories and Special Interrogatories without objections within 10 days of notice of entry of order. Defendant 3066 market Street LLC shall provide response without objections to Requests for Production, Form Interrogatories and Special Interrogatories within 10 days of notice of entry of order. Sanctions are granted in the amount of $1,125 against defendants. = (501/REQ)
